text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MBSF Other Chronic or Potentially Disabling Conditions Segment Codebook │ August 2025 │ V 1.7 80 

ULCERS_MEDICARE 

LABEL: Pressure Ulcers and Chronic Ulcers End-of-Year Indicator — Medicare Only Claims 

DESCRIPTION: This variable indicates whether a beneficiary met the condition criteria for pressure ulcers and chronic 
ulcers as of the end of the calendar year. 

SHORT NAME: ULCERS_MEDICARE 

LONG NAME: ULCERS_MEDICARE 

TYPE: NUM
